# libgen-mcp

> A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that searches and downloads books, papers, comics, magazines and standards from Library Genesis for AI assistants.

libgen-mcp v0.1.0 is a single static Go binary that runs locally via stdio or remotely via HTTP transport.
It provides exactly 3 MCP tools (search, get_details, download) over the libgen.li family of mirrors. No account, token or credential is required. Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS (amd64 + arm64).

Quick start:

1. Download the prebuilt binary for your platform from the Releases page (recommended — no dependencies), or use Docker (see below)
2. Add the server to your AI client configuration (see below)
3. Start searching — no sign-up, API key or token is needed

Installing for an AI assistant (headless):

If you are an AI assistant setting this up for a user from just this repository URL, write the MCP client configuration directly. No credentials are required. The recommended install is the prebuilt static binary (no dependencies — see below); if you cannot determine the user's OS and architecture, the Docker form is the most portable. Cursor, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code use an `mcpServers` key; VS Code and GitHub Copilot use a `servers` key (each entry also sets `"type": "stdio"`). The `mcpServers` form with Docker:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "libgen": {
      "command": "docker",
      "args": ["run", "-i", "--rm", "ghcr.io/jmrplens/libgen-mcp:latest"]
    }
  }
}
```

For VS Code / GitHub Copilot, use the `servers` key instead of `mcpServers` and add `"type": "stdio"` to the `libgen` entry.

Native binary instead of Docker: download the release asset for the user's OS and architecture from the Releases page, then use its path as `command` with no `args` (no `env` block is needed — no token is required).

Claude Code (CLI): `claude mcp add libgen -- docker run -i --rm ghcr.io/jmrplens/libgen-mcp:latest` (Docker), or `claude mcp add libgen -- libgen-mcp` (native binary).

Configuration (environment variables, all optional):

- LIBGEN_MIRROR: force a specific mirror base URL, e.g. `https://libgen.li` (default: auto-discovered)
- LIBGEN_MCP_DOWNLOAD_DIR: download destination directory (default: `~/Downloads`)
- LIBGEN_MCP_TIMEOUT: timeout per HTTP request, e.g. `30s` (default: 30s)
- LIBGEN_MCP_LOG_LEVEL: log level — debug, info, warn or error (default: info)
- LIBGEN_MCP_RATE_RPS: allowed requests per second (default: 1)
- LIBGEN_MCP_RATE_BURST: maximum rate-limiter burst (default: 1)
- LIBGEN_MCP_MAX_DOWNLOAD_BYTES: maximum download size in bytes, 0 = no limit (default: 0)
- LIBGEN_MCP_MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS: simultaneous downloads (default: 2)
- LIBGEN_MCP_RETRY_ATTEMPTS: retries per request (default: 3)
- LIBGEN_MCP_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL: contact email required by the Unpaywall API for article downloads
- LIBGEN_MCP_SCIHUB_HOSTS: comma-separated ordered Sci-Hub mirror hosts (bare host, no scheme)
- LIBGEN_MCP_SOURCES: comma-separated enabled download sources — unpaywall, scihub, libgen, randombook (empty = all)

Tools:

- search: Search the Library Genesis catalog.
- get_details: Full metadata for a Library Genesis record (description, identifiers, DOI, cover, related edition) via its JSON API.
- download: Download a file to a local directory.

## Documentation

- [Getting started](docs/getting-started.md): Installation and first-run guide
- [Configuration](docs/configuration.md): Full environment-variable configuration reference
- [Tools](docs/tools.md): Per-tool reference for search, get_details and download
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Internal architecture, mirror discovery and download sources
- [Troubleshooting](docs/troubleshooting.md): Common setup and runtime issues
- [Privacy policy](PRIVACY.md): No telemetry; requests go only to Library Genesis mirrors and article sources
- [Headless install](llms-install.md): Machine-readable install guide for AI assistants

## Optional

- [Full LLM reference](llms-full.txt): Generated companion reference with full tool schemas
- [Documentation site](https://jmrplens.github.io/libgen-mcp/): Rendered documentation site
